from pathlib import Path
p = Path('predict.py')
s = p.read_text()
# Prefer threecrop as default based on public OOD val replay. Keep compatibility if exact argparse text differs.
s = s.replace("default='center_flip'", "default='threecrop'")
s = s.replace('default="center_flip"', 'default="threecrop"')
s = s.replace("default='center'", "default='threecrop'")
s = s.replace('default="center"', 'default="threecrop"')
p.write_text(s)
print('patched default TTA to threecrop if argparse default was found')
